name: Libby's Famous Homemade Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Combine filling ingredients in the order given; pour into pie shell.
3. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce temperature to 350°F.
5. Bake an additional 45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Cool and garnish with ready-whip topping.
